sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75838" key="ou)loqute/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐλο-θῠτέω</orth>, <sense id="n75838.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">offer a whole</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">perfect sacrifice</tr_>; or (from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὐλαί</foreign>), <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strew the sacred barley before the sacrifice</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
